title: Full-width workspace surfaces and task board quick actions
description: Remove unnecessary width caps from dense workspace screens and refine the Tasks board with always-visible Done, overflow secondary actions, and quick-add controls so large displays are used more effectively.

title: Task board keyboard shortcut discoverability
description: Add a compact shortcut/help affordance to the Tasks screen so power users can discover search, quick-add, and board navigation shortcuts without guessing.

title: Focused Vitest collection baseline cleanup
description: Exclude Playwright e2e specs and Odysseus TAP files from the unit-test runner so pnpm test reports source regressions instead of environment collection noise.

title: Health check regression smoke script
description: Package the JSON/status/body validation health check into a reusable workspace script so cron cycles and manual deploys do not accidentally accept HTML fallback pages as healthy API responses.
